gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/62)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (11/62)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ أَذَاعَ عَلَيْنَا حَدِيثَنَا سَلَبَهُ اللَّهُ الْإِيمَانَ .

en.hubeali: Yunus, from Ibn Muskan, from Ibn Abu Yafour who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The one who publicises upon usasws of ourasws Ahadeeth, Allahazwj will Confiscate his Emān’.
en.sarwar: 3. Yunus has narrated from ibn Muskan from ibn abu Ya’fur who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Whoever publicizes our (confidential) Hadith, Allah will take away his belief.’”
